states.name: MoveTo(λ_target_behind(), False)
states.description: Move to open space 4 meters behind teammate to receive ball

states.name: MoveToBallAndGetPossession()
states.description: Move to ball and get possession when pass is made

states.name: Pass(teammate)
states.description: Pass ball back to teammate at distance 4 meters

states.name: MoveToBallAndGetPossession()
states.description: Move to ball and get possession from teammate's return pass

states.name: MoveTo(λ_target_infront_space(), False)
states.description: Move to open space 5 meters in front of teammate after receiving ball

states.name: MoveToBallAndGetPossession()
states.description: Move to ball and get possession for final attack

transitions.description: Wait to receive a pass from teammate before moving to ball
Wait until you have ball possession before passing
Wait to receive a return pass from teammate
Move to open space 5 meters in front of teammate after receiving ball
Wait to receive the ball in advanced position
Turn to goal and shoot when less than 14 meters from goal
